parameters.query: INSERT INTO manager_tickets (phone, driver_id, topic, reason, status, priority, source_message_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.phone }}', {{ $json.driver_id || 'NULL' }}, '{{ $json.topic.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.reason.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', 'open', {{ $json.priority || 1 }}, {{ $json.source_message_id || 'NULL' }}, NOW(), NOW()) RETURNING id;
UPDATE driver_states SET dialog_mode = 'manual', requires_attention = TRUE, last_intent = '{{ $json.intent }}', updated_at = NOW() WHERE phone = '{{ $json.phone }}';

INSERT INTO conversation_messages (phone, driver_id, direction, sender_type, message_type, text, provider_message_id, delivery_status, raw_payload, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.phone }}', {{ $json.driver_id || 'NULL' }}, 'outgoing', 'system', 'text', 'Ваш запрос передан менеджеру. Ожидайте ответа.', NULL, 'pending', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.raw_payload).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb, NOW(), NOW()) RETURNING id;

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { reply: 'Ваш запрос передан менеджеру. Ожидайте ответа.' } }];
